title: Road closure: Accident on Kaaimans Pass
bodyText:
Breaking News

GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Kaaiman's Pass is closed in both directions following a collision between two trucks earlier this morning, Sunday 2 November.


> George Fire Department and emergency services are currently on scene and there is no estimated time of reopening available at this stage.


No alternative routes are currently available.

The public is urged to avoid the area and to exercise patience while emergency teams attend to the incident.

Updates will follow as they become available.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
